component.name: TuneConsole
component.summary: Power-manage and tune your YouTube Music library

description.p: TuneConsole is a local console for power-managing your YouTube Music library, with a recommendation model you can actually see into and tune. Discover new artists and rediscoveries drawn from your own listening, generate playlists from your taste, and merge, reorganize and clean up playlists across multiple accounts.
Everything runs on your own machine. The app serves a web UI on 127.0.0.1; your library, play history and taste model live in one file on your computer, never on a server.

screenshot.caption: Discovery drawn from your own listening
A recommendation model you can see into and tune
Explore your library as an interactive map

description.p: Version synced with the browser extension; packaging and metadata polish.
